ab: ’inavayan, tratrima’ u za eman?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: tratrima’ ku za saya za takilr.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: ’inavayan, tratrima’ u za eman?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: tratrima’ ku za saya za talupung.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: tratrima’ ku za saya za kavung.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: tratrima’ ku za takilr, menaniwan mu?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: ai, tratrima’ u za pidaya?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: menaniwan mu za puran?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: ’azi, ’azi mi menaniwan za puran.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: tratrima’ ku za veras.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: tratrima’ u za pidaya luvuk?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: verayay ku za teluwa luvuk.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: tratrima’ ku za vurasi.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: piya meniwan lra kana vurasi.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: tratrima’ ku za zuwaya dalilr za imar.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: tratrima’ ku za zuwaya dalilr za lrawlraw.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: misama’ mi za saya dalilr.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: uwa trima’anay ku za trinun.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: tratrima’ u za pidaya tingting?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: tratrima’ u za pidaya tingting za trinun?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: tratrima’ ku za zuwaya tingting.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: tratrima’ ku za zuwaya vetu’ za kenaw.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: misama’ za teluwa vetu’, elaku lra peniya!
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: manueman paisu ini na saya luvuk na veras?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: zuwaya leman paisu na saya luvuk.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: makavetra’an misama’ za saya paisu peniya, verayay ku za makavetra’an paisu.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: lrayuwan.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: makaiwa misama’ za lruwatra paisu peniya.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: puwapuwa ku ziya tremima’ za saema, ku trulrtrulray penauwa za saleman paisu.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: lruwatra leman misama’ za muketrep paisu peniya.
en: A:All $510.

ab: kuwatreng nu penauwa za lruwatra leman paisu?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: kapazangalan lra i ini, kaduluyu za saema?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: ’azi karuwa, madulu lra.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: aelak ku kanini na walru.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: makatelun paisu izu na walru, aelak u ziya za eman?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
